lane.title: 09 POS Write
lane.last_task: Captain POS session-expired gap + refund audit
lane.last_summary: Deep-audited Captain POS operational issue on HE production test.hamzahotel.com after tablet showed Odoo Server Error / Session expired during payment validation. Verified this was Captain-only: Cash and Ground POS sales continued, Captain config/session/pricelists/payment methods remained healthy, and V2 Captain offer pricing itself was correct. Found Captain backend sequence 2670-6 had local/server save gaps after repeated stale-tab payment attempts: user water test saved as 2670-6-000006, photographed ₹746.35 order was later re-entered and saved as 2670-6-000005 with matching lines/table/payment, leaving only 2670-6-000004 unresolved. May 1-current Captain sequence audit found historical missing 2662-6-000127 between 20 May 2026 03:05:54 IST and 14:38:26 IST, likely around previous-day closing/new-session transition. Read-only audited refund order 8059: HE - Captain - 000035 REFUND is currently a paid negative refund for -₹125 at 25 May 2026 03:03 IST, linked to original order 7731 from 22 May 2026; user explicitly stopped any correction, so no write was performed.
lane.next_action: Do not mutate refund order 8059 unless Nihaf explicitly resumes and confirms. Operationally, staff must confirm whether 2670-6-000004 was a real second bill or just a failed duplicate local slot; if real, re-enter that bill from staff/KDS/payment evidence. For Captain tablets, close stale POS tabs, reload/login fresh before payment validation, then verify new Captain order sequence saves in backend.
lane.mutation_status: No new mutation in this follow-up. Read-only Odoo/POS audits only; previous V2 pricelist mutation remains unchanged. Refund 8059 was not modified because user said wait/don't do anything.
